name: Sloane Alabaster Table Lamp - 30 Inch Height - TBL4065 - White/Gold - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Sloane Alabaster Table Lamp. Crafted with a stunning combination of white alabaster and gold, this elegant piece blends seamlessly into any decor. Its white linen shade softly diffuses light, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. The sturdy design ensures stability while the sleek finish adds a touch of sophistication. Perfect for your living room, bedroom, or office, the Sloane Alabaster Table Lamp is more than just a lighting solution?it is a statement of style and elegance. Bring home this beautiful lamp to elevate your space with a gentle glow and timeless charm.
